children.heading: Limitation based on amount of tax
children.label: a Limitation based on amount of tax

children.text: the taxpayer’s regular tax liability for the taxable year reduced by the foreign tax credit allowable under section 27, and
the tax imposed by section 55(a) for the taxable year.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The term “regular tax liability” means the tax imposed by this chapter for the taxable year.

children.label: A
children.text: section 55 (relating to minimum tax),

children.label: B
children.text: section 59A (relating to base erosion and anti-abuse tax),

children.label: C
children.text: subsection (m)(5)(B), (q), (t), or (v) of section 72 (relating to additional taxes on certain distributions),

children.label: D
children.text: section 143(m) (relating to recapture of proration of Federal subsidy from use of mortgage bonds and mortgage credit certificates),

children.label: E
children.text: section 530(d)(4) (relating to additional tax on certain distributions from Coverdell education savings accounts),

children.label: F
children.text: section 531 (relating to accumulated earnings tax),

children.label: G
children.text: section 541 (relating to personal holding company tax),

children.label: H
children.text: section 1351(d)(1) (relating to recoveries of foreign expropriation losses),

children.label: I
children.text: section 1374 (relating to tax on certain built-in gains of S corporations),

children.label: J
children.text: section 1375 (relating to tax imposed when passive investment income of corporation having subchapter C earnings and profits exceeds 25 percent of gross receipts),

children.label: K
children.text: subparagraph (A) of section 7518(g)(6) (relating to nonqualified withdrawals from capital construction funds taxed at highest marginal rate),

children.label: L
children.text: sections 871(a) and 881 (relating to certain income of nonresident aliens and foreign corporations),

children.label: M
children.text: section 860E(e) (relating to taxes with respect to certain residual interests),

children.label: N
children.text: section 884 (relating to branch profits tax),

children.label: O
children.text: sections 453()(3) and 453A(c) (relating to interest on certain deferred tax liabilities),l

children.label: P
children.text: Repealed. , , .]Pub. L. 115–141, div. U, title IV, § 401(b)(2)132 Stat. 1201Mar. 23, 2018

children.label: Q
children.text: section 220(f)(4) (relating to additional tax on Archer MSA distributions not used for qualified medical expenses),

children.label: R
children.text: section 138(c)(2) (relating to penalty for distributions from Medicare Advantage MSA not used for qualified medical expenses if minimum balance not maintained),

children.label: S
children.text: sections 106(e)(3)(A)(ii), 223(b)(8)(B)(i)(II), and 408(d)(9)(D)(i)(II) (relating to certain failures to maintain high deductible health plan coverage),

children.label: T
children.text: section 170()(3)(B) (relating to recapture of certain deductions for fractional gifts),o

children.label: U
children.text: section 223(f)(4) (relating to additional tax on health savings account distributions not used for qualified medical expenses),

children.label: V
children.text: subsections (a)(1)(B)(i) and (b)(4)(A) of section 409A (relating to interest and additional tax with respect to certain deferred compensation),

children.label: W
children.text: section 36(f) (relating to recapture of homebuyer credit),

children.label: X
children.text: section 457A(c)(1)(B) (relating to determinability of amounts of compensation),

children.label: Y
children.text: section 529A(c)(3)(A) (relating to additional tax on ABLE account distributions not used for qualified disability expenses), and

children.label: Z
children.text: section 24(j)(2) (relating to excess advance payments).

children.heading: Tentative minimum tax
children.label: c Tentative minimum tax
children.text: For purposes of this part, the term “tentative minimum tax” means the amount determined under section 55(b)(1).
